name: Verify affiliate links across YouTube videos
description: Caleb task — open the last N Building Shultz YouTube videos in a browser, check that each affiliate link in the description still resolves (no 404, no expired affiliate ID), and report bad links so Jed can fix them.
trigger_examples: check all the amazon links across the channel
audit affiliate links in the last 30 videos
prompt_template: Caleb: open https://studio.youtube.com/channel/UC... → Content. For each of the last {{video_count}} videos, open the description, extract all affiliate URLs (amazon, acmetool, etc.), HEAD-request each one, and flag any that 404 or redirect to a parked domain. Return a structured list: video_title, broken_url, suggested_replacement.
escalation_conditions: more than 20% of links broken — escalate for batch repair plan
any link redirects to spam/sketchy domain — flag immediately
caleb_steps: For each of the latest N videos, expand description

smoke_test.trigger_message: audit affiliate links in the last 20 videos

notes: PC-side because YouTube Studio is most reliably read through a logged-in browser session. Requires the PC relay /caleb-task endpoint to exist (pending).
